target: Beijing Institute of Technology Zhongguancun campus SUMO road network

resolved_candidate.display_name: Beijing Institute of Technology, Zhongguancun South Street, Haidian, Beijing, China

construction.netconvert_raw_command: netconvert --osm-files bit_zhongguancun.osm.xml --output-file bit_zhongguancun.raw.net.xml --geometry.remove --ramps.guess false --junctions.join --junctions.join-output joined-junctions.xml --tls.guess-signals --tls.discard-simple --remove-edges.isolated --keep-edges.by-vclass passenger --keep-edges.in-geo-boundary 116.3018,39.9548,116.3176,39.9608 --osm.lane-access --osm.turn-lanes --verbose

warnings_and_risks: Raw OSM conversion produced small disconnected passenger fragments; default network uses largest weak connected component.
netconvert reported OSM cycleway compound tag warnings and skipped some junction joins.
Generated 9 traffic lights from OSM/netconvert; these require external or manual TLS review before signal-control claims.
No real campus demand, signal timing, detector alignment, or controller-readiness claim is made.
